passive.name: Noxious Slipstream
passive.description: Singed drafts off nearby champions, gaining a burst of Move Speed when passing them.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} Whenever {{ci|Singed}} moves near a {{tip|champion}}, he gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for a short time, which refreshes on subsequent passes and stacks up to a cap.
wiki_detail.blurb2: This effect cannot occur on the same target more than once every few seconds.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} Whenever '''Singed''' moves near a {{tip|champion}}, he gains a [[stack]] of ''Noxious Slipstream'' for 2 seconds, refreshing on subsequent passes and stacking up to 25 times.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Noxious Slipstream:}} For each stack, '''Singed''' gains {{sti|ms|{{as|25% '''bonus''' movement speed}}}}, up to a maximum of {{as|625%|ms}}.
wiki_detail.description3: This effect cannot occur on the same target more than once every few seconds.

Q.name: Poison Trail
Q.description: Leaves a trail of poison behind Singed, dealing damage to enemies caught in the path.
Q.tooltip: Toggle: Singed lays a poisonous trail that deals {{ damagepersecond }} magic damage per second.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Toggle:}} {{ci|Singed}} continually creates a toxic cloud that shortly lingers in his wake, which continually inflicts {{tip|poison}} to enemies within.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{tip|poison|nolink=true}}:}} The target continually takes {{as|magic damage}} over a short time. Subsequent inflictions refresh the duration.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Toggle:}} '''Singed''' continually creates a toxic cloud in his wake that lingers for {{fd|3.25}} seconds. The cloud inflicts {{tip|poison}} to enemies within, and resets the duration every {{fd|0.5}} seconds while they remain.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|{{tip|poison|nolink=true}}:}} The target takes {{as|magic damage}} every {{fd|0.25}} seconds over 2 seconds. Subsequent inflictions refresh the duration.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Magic Damage per Tick|{{ap|5 to 15}} {{as|(+ {{fd|10.625}}% AP)}}|Total Magic Damage|{{ap|5*8 to 15*8}} {{as|(+ {{ap|10.625*8}}% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.knockdown:
|notes        = 
*Toggle abilities do not count as ability activations for the purposes of on-cast effects such as {{tip|Spellblade}} and triggering {{ais|Force Pulse|Kassadin}} passive.
* The clouds check for enemy targets in the area immediately upon being spawned. After a {{fd|0.25}}-{{fd|0.5}} second delay, they check every {{fd|0.25}} seconds again until they fade.
** Targets already with the DoT can have the debuff refreshed only every {{fd|0.5}} seconds.
** Due to the inconsistent offset between the first and future ticks is it possible for a static target to miss out on one refresh of the debuff, equal to 3 ticks of damage.
* If '''Singed''' has moved less than 90 units since spawning the last poison cloud, it will spawn 35 units in front of him. They also only spawn every 1 second in this case. 
** When '''Singed''' is moving faster than that, the poison clouds spawn more frequently and on top of himself.

W.name: Mega Adhesive
W.description: Throws a vial of mega adhesive on the ground, slowing and grounding enemies who walk on it.
W.tooltip: Singed hurls a cask of sticky liquid, Grounding and Slowing enemies in the area by {{ slowpercent }}% for {{ wduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Singed}} creates a field of adhesive at the target location for a short time that {{tip|ground|grounds}} and {{tip|slows}} enemies within.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Singed''' spills a potent adhesive that lands at the target location after {{fd|0.375}} seconds, creating a field for 3 seconds that {{tip|ground|grounds}} enemies within and {{tip|slows}} them.

E.name: Fling
E.description: Damages target enemy unit and flings them into the air behind Singed. If the target Singed flings lands in his Mega Adhesive, they are also rooted.
E.tooltip:
Singed flings an enemy over his shoulder, dealing {{ basedamage }} plus {{ e3 }}% max Health magic damage.

If Singed flings a target into his Mega Adhesive, they are Rooted for {{ e2 }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Singed}} {{tip|airborne|flings}} the target enemy over, dealing {{as|magic damage}} based on {{as|their '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If the target lands on ''{{ai|Mega Adhesive|Singed}}'', they are briefly {{tip|root|rooted}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Singed''' {{tip|airborne|flings}} the target enemy 550 units over himself, dealing {{as|magic damage}}. The damage based on the target's health ratio is capped at 300 against {{tip|minions}} and {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|50 to 90}} {{as|(+ {{ap|6 to 8}}% of target's '''maximum''' health)}} {{as|(+ 60% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: If the target lands on ''{{ai|Mega Adhesive|Singed}}'', they are {{tip|root|rooted}} for a duration.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Fling'' can throw enemies over walls (circumstances permitting).
* {{tip|Slow-immune}} enemies will not be {{tip|root|rooted}} when ''flung'' into {{ai|Mega Adhesive|Singed}}.
* ''Fling'' is special cased to not {{tip|airborne|fling}} {{ci|Warwick}} while '''Singed''' is {{tip|suppression|suppressed}} by {{ai|Infinite Duress|Warwick}} after the cast time.
{{Unit-targeted cancel conditions}}
wiki_detail.tips: * '''Singed''' may successfully issue a basic attack against the target of ''Fling'' while it is mid-air.

R.name: Insanity Potion
R.description: Singed drinks a potent brew of chemicals, granting him increased combat stats, and making his Poison Trail apply Grievous Wounds.
R.tooltip: Singed drinks a potent brew of chemicals, granting him {{ statamount }} Ability Power, Armor, Magic Resist, Move Speed, Health Regen, and Mana Regen for {{ duration }} seconds. During this effect, Singed's Poison Trail also applies {{ grievousamount*100 }}% Grievous Wounds for {{ grievousduration }} second.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Singed}} empowers himself for some time with {{sti|ap|{{as|'''bonus''' ability power}}}}, {{sti|armor|{{as|'''bonus''' armor}}}}, {{sti|mr|{{as|'''bonus''' magic resist}}}}, {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}}, {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' health regen}}}}, and {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' mana regen}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: During this time, ''{{ai|Poison Trail|Singed}}'' additionally applies {{tip|Grievous Wounds}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Singed''' empowers himself for 25 seconds with {{sti|ap|{{as|ability power}}}}, {{sti|armor|{{as|'''bonus''' armor}}}}, {{sti|mr|{{as|'''bonus''' magic resistance}}}}, {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}}, {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' health regeneration}}}}, and {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' mana regeneration}}}}.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Bonus Stats|{{ap|30 to 100}}}}
{{st|Regeneration per Second|{{ap|30/5 to 100/5}}|Total Regeneration|{{ap|30*5 to 100*5}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: During this time, ''{{ai|Poison Trail|Singed}}'' additionally applies {{tip|Grievous Wounds}} for 1 second, which refreshes every {{fd|0.25}} seconds while the {{tip|poison}} persists.
